title: Talupulamma Lova
tagline: Talupulamma Lova — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Talupulamma Temple (popularly known as Talupulamma Lova) is a Hindu pilgrimage site located in the village of Lova in Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Talupulamma Temple (popularly known as Talupulamma Lova) is a Hindu pilgrimage site located in the village of Lova in Kakinada district of Andhra Pradesh, India. The presiding deity is a gramadevatha known as Talupulamma Thalli (lit. Goddess who grants wishes). It is located between two heavily forested hillocks Darakonda and Teegakonda near the City of Tuni and has views of the valley.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Talupulamma Lova?
faq.a: The best time to visit Talupulamma Lova is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Talupulamma Lova?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajahmundry Airport (78 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (94 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Talupulamma Lova?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Talupulamma Lova at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Talupulamma Lova?
faq.a: Stays in Talupulamma Lova start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Talupulamma Lova?
faq.a: The top attractions are Namagiri Narendrapatnam, Dhara Jagannadhapuram, Tuni, Payakaraopeta, Latchireddipalem.
